title: Atoke 24 Pack Christmas Red Berries Stems,15 Head Artificial Berry Picks Holly Berries Burgundy Branches for Crafts,Winter Holiday Wedding,Holiday Home Decor
features: Package Included:24 pieces red berry picks,enough quantity to meet your needs to decorate Christmas tree and match many holiday decoration.
Premium Material:Christmas berries are made of foam red balls and steel wire.lightwight ,durable to hang on anywhere you like,The flexible stem can be easily shaped to suit your needs.

Versatile DIY: Ideal for Christmas floral displays, craft wreaths,Christmas tree ornaments, enhance indoor lanterns, and create a rustic farmhouse look on your tree, combine with other element to add a Christmas atemosphere.
Berry Dimensions: Each stem is approximately 7.8 inches (20 cm) long, berries measure around 0.6 inches (1.5 cm) in diameter. The stems are sturdy yet pliable for your crafting needs.

Wide Application: Perfect for Christmas tree and wreath decorations, creating decorative ball flowers, and adding a festive touch to holiday, home, party, and winter wedding decor. These vivid red berry picks also make charming gifts for your family and friends.
